TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Kawabata, title = Kawabata, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kawabata} }

S.FORM: alang Kawabata ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 54 buwan, 174 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 164 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kawabata hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga Sipazi'. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga Kyu'ang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Kawabata ga niya mki sku Sincik Keng atu Gpho go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 54 buwan, 174 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 94% kyan ku 164 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 6% kyan ku 10 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 91%, Amis 1%, Paywan 1%, saySiyat 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Kawabata hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Kawabata hya' ga Sipazi'. tay mkraya' na Kawabata hya' ga Kyu'ang. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaЕӢ kawaОІata ЙЈa nija mki s~Й•ku s~Й•inКҰ~КЁik keЕӢ atu ЙЈpД§o ЙЈo, kwara s~Й•ali ОІuwan nja ЙЈa ** ОІuwan, *** Д§i ku kwara s~Й•К”uli tajan. s~Й•К”uli tajan pins~Й•pЕӢan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa **% kjan ku *** Д§i, ОІinaД§ ЙЈa, К”jat kaД§un s~Й•ku pins~Й•pЕӢan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa *% kjan ku ** Д§i nja. pins~Й•puЕӢ na linД§ujan ЙЈjenКҰ~КЁumin ЙЈa, tajan **%, amis~Й• *%, pajwan *%, s~Й•ajs~Й•ijat *%. maki qu ЕӢas~Й•al ОІziran. rД§zjal kkiК”an taj К”llaw na kawaОІata Д§jaК” ЙЈa rЙЈjax kraД§uК”. taj К”zil na kawaОІata Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj mkjaД§uК” na kawaОІata Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj mkrajaК” na kawaОІata Д§jaК” ЙЈa lljuЕӢ. taj К”zil na kawaОІata Д§jaК” ЙЈa s~Й•ipaziК”. taj mkrajaК” na kawaОІata Д§jaК” ЙЈa kjuК”aЕӢ. rekis~Й•i kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~Й•s~Й•quliq pinlpЙЈan ppqОІaqan pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” КҰ~КЁikuj pqwas~Й•an ОІiru К”laqiК” mrkjas~Й• tuqi К”s~Й•an ОІas~Й•u kis~Й•jaК” ЙЈlЙЈan s~Й•pjaЕӢan na pinОІaД§u uОІuj qqmajД§
